tests.name: Single-click on a live reference opens a vertical split with the target previewed refSingleClick on a live reference produces a split with topRef=current and bottomRef=target
Single-click in an open split replaces the bottom pane only refSingleClick when splitState !== null replaces bottomRef and keeps topRef unchanged
Ctrl+click across sub-tabs switches sub-tab, list selection, and detail in one atomic update refCtrlClick to a target in another sub-tab updates 4 fields in one returned state
Ctrl+click within the same sub-tab swaps only the list selection and detail refCtrlClick to a target in the same sub-tab leaves activeSubTab unchanged
Ctrl+click closes any open split as part of the commit refCtrlClick when splitState !== null returns splitState === null
Ctrl+click preserves a filter that already shows the target refCtrlClick with a target whose source matches the existing filter leaves the filter intact
Ctrl+click resets the destination filter when it would hide the target refCtrlClick with a target whose source mismatches the existing filter clears the filter and emits the cue
Single-click on a dead reference is a complete no-op refSingleClick with a dead ResolvedRef returns the same state reference
Ctrl+click on a dead reference is a complete no-op refCtrlClick with a dead ResolvedRef returns the same state reference
Manual list-row selection does not push a history entry selectItem leaves history.entries.length unchanged (ADR-008)
Manual sub-tab switch does not push a history entry switchSubTab leaves history.entries.length unchanged (ADR-008)
Close button collapses the split back to a single pane closeSplit returns splitState === null and pushes one history entry

Cross-reference history entries record the originating action and target itemKey refSingleClick (open-from-empty), refSingleClick (bottom-replace), refCtrlClick, and closeSplit each push an entry whose action and targetItemKey match the dispatched intent

Ctrl+click into a destination sub-tab with no active filter preserves state and emits no cue refCtrlClick on a cross-tab live target whose destination sub-tab has no entry in filter.bySubTab returns the same filter reference and a null cue

Ctrl+click into a destination sub-tab whose existing filter has source=null preserves state and emits no cue refCtrlClick on a cross-tab live target whose destination filter exists with source === null returns the same filter reference and a null cue
Single-click on a live reference with no current anchor is a complete no-op refSingleClick when splitState === null and currentEntry === null returns the same state reference
Cross-tab Ctrl+click maps each RefType to its canonical Configuration sub-tab refCtrlClick on a live 'agent -> \'agents\'' sets activeSubTab to the canonical sub-tab id
Cross-tab Ctrl+click maps each RefType to its canonical Configuration sub-tab refCtrlClick on a live 'command -> \'commands\'' sets activeSubTab to the canonical sub-tab id
Cross-tab Ctrl+click maps each RefType to its canonical Configuration sub-tab refCtrlClick on a live 'mcp -> \'mcp\'' sets activeSubTab to the canonical sub-tab id
Cross-tab Ctrl+click maps each RefType to its canonical Configuration sub-tab refCtrlClick on a live 'rule -> \'rules\'' sets activeSubTab to the canonical sub-tab id
Cross-tab Ctrl+click maps each RefType to its canonical Configuration sub-tab refCtrlClick on a live 'plugin -> \'plugins\'' sets activeSubTab to the canonical sub-tab id
